challenge.title: Korak 17
challenge.description:
Element .message zahteva neku stilizaciju. Daj mu:

  • font-size od 1.2em,
  • margin-bottom od 20px.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Happy Birthday!

Wishing you all the happiness and joy on your special day!

Send Card Share on Social Media

Card successfully sent to your recipient!

Sharing your card...

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: The .message selektor treba da ima font-size svojstvo set do 1.2em.
Selektor .message bi trebalo da ima svojstvo margin-bottom set do 20px.
